rulings.Case Title: JACK WARREN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS 'B*P' AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel The Boeing Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Document
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, May 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel defendant The Boeing Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents is denied without prejudice to refiling the motion if the moving papers are personally served on Boeing. As a non-party to this action, Boeing¿s objection to the service of the motion¿by mail rather than by personal service¿is sustained. (CRC 3.1346). = (220/HEK)
